name: ai-interview-pro
description: Interview - single-command setup (installs both apps, builds frontend, runs everything from one Express server on one port)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: npm run install:all && npm run build && npm start --prefix backend
scripts.dev: npm run install:all && concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
